substances.name: Alprostadil
substances.summary: 前列地尔（Alprostadil）的临床药理、监测和时间进程资料索引。

indications: Temporary maintenance of ductus arteriosus patency in neonates with ductal-dependent congenital heart disease
contraindications: No absolute contraindication is listed for the life-preserving neonatal indication; use is protocol and specialist driven
majorWarnings: Cortical proliferation of long bones with prolonged infusion
majorInteractions: Management is intensive-care protocol driven; consult the full label for concomitant therapy

sourceRefs.title: DailyMed PROSTIN VR PEDIATRIC label
sourceRefs.labelSection: Dosage and Administration; Warnings; Clinical Pharmacology

notes: Clinical effect is infusion dependent and assessed by oxygenation, blood pressure, and ductal-dependent circulation rather than plasma concentration.

sourceRefs.title: DailyMed PROSTIN VR PEDIATRIC label
sourceRefs.labelSection: Dosage and Administration; Warnings; Clinical Pharmacology

tdm.monitoringType: clinical and laboratory monitoring rather than routine plasma concentration
tdm.reason: Routine management is based on clinical response and safety monitoring rather than plasma drug concentration.
interpretationCaveats: Pharmacokinetic parameters belong in timeCourse and are not therapeutic concentration targets.

sourceRefs.title: DailyMed PROSTIN VR PEDIATRIC label
sourceRefs.labelSection: Dosage and Administration; Warnings; Clinical Pharmacology

doseUseReferences.indication: Neonatal ductal-patency support in the cited label
doseUseReferences.population: Adults unless otherwise specified by the cited label
doseUseReferences.amountText: 0.05-0.1 mcg/kg/min initial infusion range in the cited label
doseUseReferences.scheduleText: Continuous infusion with reduction to the lowest rate maintaining response
